channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democratic Rep. Steve Cohen halts reelection bid after Tennessee redraws his district
item.description: Democratic Rep. Steven Cohen ends his campaign for reelection in Memphis after Tennessee's mid-decade redistricting.

item.title: Women and babies at risk after Supreme Court allows mail-order abortion for now
item.description: Justice Samuel Alito criticized colleagues for their 'unreasoned order' granting stays in the case, calling it 'remarkable.'

item.title: Supreme Court allows abortion pills to be sent by mail
item.description: The frustration of the two justices who wrote sharp dissents is easy to understand.

item.title: Unlikely alliance: Environmental groups and oil refining states join to oppose E15 ethanol
item.description: Wyoming Republican Sen. John Barrasso and left-wing climate group Earthjustice share a common goal in opposing E15 ethanol.
